category_sources: source_facts.description says immich-cli is a command-line interface for the self-hosted photo manager Immich.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name lists the package name as immich-cli.
docs_sources: Official Immich documentation has a dedicated command-line interface page.
repo_sources: Official Immich docs and package distribution identify the CLI as part of the Immich project hosted at github.com/immich-app/immich.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Immich photo-manager CLI usage; official Immich CLI docs list upload and server-version features.
